if(!recommendations.some(r=>r.title.includes('Energy'))){recommendations.push({title:"💡 Energy Efficiency at Home",description:"LED bulbs and smart thermostats can reduce household energy consumption by 20-30%.",potential_savings:1.2,impact:"Medium",priority:priority++});}return recommendations;};const isNetworkError=err=>{if(!err)return true;return!err.response||err.code==='ECONNABORTED'||err.code==='ENOTFOUND'||err.code==='ECONNREFUSED'||err.isNetworkError===true||err.message&&(err.message.includes('Network')||err.message.includes('Failed to fetch')||err.message.includes('timeout')||err.message.includes('ERR_NETWORK'));};const fetchRecommendations=async()=>{try{// First, try to generate personalized recommendations based on detections
